<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Config; use Spatie\Backup\Support\Data; class SourceFilesConfig extends Data { /** * @param array<string> $include * @param array<string> $exclude */ protected function __construct( public array $include, public array $exclude, public bool $followLinks, public bool $ignoreUnreadableDirectories, public ?string $relativePath, ) {} /** @param array<mixed> $data */ public static function fromArray(array $data): self { return new self( include: $data['include'], exclude: $data['exclude'], followLinks: $data['follow_links'] ?? false, ignoreUnreadableDirectories: $data['ignore_unreadable_directories'] ?? false, relativePath: $data['relative_path'], ); } }
